sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48233" key="qeo/mimos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεό-μῑμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48233.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">imitating God</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θ. πρᾶγμα βασιλῄα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diotog.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.7.62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
